op.update-im-history
i wanna make phone calls with this app, how do I upgrade my plan?

**This is how to Upgrade Your CINNOX Plan for Phone Calls:**

To upgrade your plan in CINNOX and enable phone call features, follow these steps:

1. **Visit the Pricing Page:**
   - Go to the [CINNOX Pricing](https://www.cinnox.com/pricing) page to review the available plans.

2. **Select Your Desired Plan:**
   - Choose a plan that includes the phone call features you need. Make sure to check the details for each plan to ensure it meets your requirements.

3. **Sign In to Your Account:**
   - Log in to your CINNOX account using your credentials.

4. **Navigate to Account Settings:**
   - Once logged in, go to your account settings or billing section.

5. **Upgrade Your Plan:**
   - Look for the option to upgrade your plan. Follow the prompts to select the new plan and confirm your choice.

6. **Payment:**
   - Complete the payment process as instructed. Ensure that your payment information is up to date.

7. **Confirmation:**
   - After upgrading, you should receive a confirmation email. Check your account to ensure that the new features are activated.

For more detailed information or assistance, you can refer to the [CINNOX Documentation](https://docs.cinnox.com/) or contact our support team.

If you have any further questions or need additional help, feel free to ask!

op.update-im-history
cinnox

To upgrade your CINNOX plan and start making phone calls, please follow these steps:

1. **Log in to your CINNOX Account**: Go to the CINNOX website and log in with your credentials.

2. **Navigate to the Pricing or Plans Section**: Look for the section that details the different plans available. This is typically found in the main menu or under your account settings.

3. **Select Your Desired Plan**: Review the available plans and select the one that best fits your needs for making phone calls.

4. **Upgrade Your Plan**: Click on the option to upgrade. You may need to confirm your selection and agree to any terms and conditions.

5. **Payment**: Enter your payment information to complete the upgrade process. Ensure that you review the pricing details before finalizing.

6. **Confirmation**: After the payment is processed, you should receive a confirmation email regarding your plan upgrade.

If you need more detailed instructions or assistance, you can refer to the CINNOX documentation or contact our support team.

For further assistance, let me know if you have any specific questions or need help with any step!
op.update-im-history
i want to upgrade on the website

To upgrade your plan on the CINNOX website, please follow these steps:

1. **Visit the CINNOX Website**: Go to the [CINNOX homepage](https://www.cinnox.com).

2. **Navigate to Pricing**: Look for the "Pricing" section in the main menu to view the different plans available.

3. **Select Your Desired Plan**: Review the plans and select the one that best fits your business needs.

4. **Add to Cart**: Click on the option to add the selected plan to your cart.

5. **Proceed to Checkout**: Follow the prompts to proceed to the checkout page.

6. **Enter Payment Information**: Fill in your payment details. Currently, CINNOX accepts Mastercard and Visa.

7. **Confirm Your Upgrade**: Review your order and confirm the upgrade.

8. **Activate Your Plan**: Once your payment is processed, your new plan will be activated.

If you need further assistance or have specific questions about the plans, feel free to ask!

Additionally, you can start with a **14-day free trial** to experience the features of CINNOX without any obligation: [Free Sign-Up](https://servicehub.cinnox.com/free-sign-up?step=email).
